Payment.title: Premium Plan
Payment.timeline-text-1: Start using Hearify Premium. Enjoy full access to the platform. You won’t be charged until the end of the trial period.
Payment.timeline-text-2: Your subscription starts. You will be charged if you do not cancel your subscription during the free trial period.
Payment.review-text: I have used Hearify several times, and I must say it's much better than ChatGPT, especially considering the number of mistakes and unnecessary questions when I asked ChatGPT to create some tests for me. Hearify creates really interesting questions that make sense—I was thrilled. I tried it with tough topics that my student asked me to help with, and I am satisfied with the results ❤️
advantages: Up to 100 test generations per month.

PricingPaymentModal.error: Unfortunately, we couldn't process your payment. Please try again later.
PricingPaymentModal.timeline-text-1: Start using your Hearify plan and enjoy full access to the platform for just $1. You won’t be charged the full price until your first week ends.
PricingPaymentModal.timeline-text-2: Your subscription starts. You will be billed regular subscription price unless you cancel before the trial ends.
PricingPaymentModal.review-text: I tried Hearify several times, and I must say it's much better than ChatGPT, especially taking into account the number of mistakes and redundancy in questions, when I asked ChatGPT to create some quizzes for me. Hearify creates really interesting questions, that make sense - I admired it. I tried it with the difficult topics my student asked me to help with and I am happy with the results ❤️

PermissionModal.description: Don’t miss out! Switch to Pro Account and

message.start-quiz: Ready to launch your quiz? Upgrade now to unlock the start feature and run quizzes seamlessly for your participants.
message.choose-quiz-options: Customize your quiz with various settings and formats! Upgrade your plan to access all quiz customization options and tailor quizzes to your needs.
message.manage-brand-kit: Personalize your quiz with your brand’s look and feel. Upgrade to use the brand kit feature and keep your quizzes on-brand with custom colors, fonts, and logos.
message.upload-logo: Make your quiz instantly recognizable by adding your logo. Unlock logo uploads by upgrading your plan for a branded quiz experience.
message.enable-timer: Want to keep your participants on their toes? Upgrade to add a timer to your quiz for a fun, time-bound challenge!
message.enable-leaderboard: Boost engagement with real-time leaderboards! Upgrade to activate this feature and let participants see their rankings live.
message.add-quiz-cover: Give your quiz a professional touch with a custom cover. Upgrade now to upload a unique quiz cover and make a great first impression!
message.add-question-cover: Enhance your quiz with custom question covers. Upgrade to add images to your questions and make your quiz more engaging and visually appealing.
message.export-google-form: Want to share your quiz via Google Forms? Upgrade to export your quiz directly to Google Forms for easy distribution.
message.export-quiz-pdf: Need a printable version of your quiz? Upgrade to access PDF exports and take your quiz offline for wider reach.
message.share-quiz-code: Share a unique quiz code to invite participants easily. Upgrade to unlock this sharing option and streamline quiz access for your audience.
message.share-quiz-link: Instantly share a direct link to your quiz! Upgrade to enable link sharing for convenient participant access.
message.share-quiz-access: Control who can access your quiz with advanced sharing options. Upgrade to gain access and keep your quizzes exclusive or public as you choose.
message.add-question-manually: Customize your quiz by adding questions manually. Upgrade to add questions directly and have complete control over your quiz content.
message.export-student-results-pdf: Export detailed student results for analysis and sharing. Upgrade now to download results in PDF format and keep comprehensive records.
message.open-summary-tab: Access a full overview of quiz details in one convenient tab. Upgrade to view the summary tab and keep track of essential quiz information easily.

subscription.upgrade_text: Want to level up your plan?

basic: Up to 5 question types per quiz
Use PDF pages or YouTube timecodes
max: Use your custom domain and logo

useOnboarding.create-quiz-description: Ready to create your first quiz? Simply upload material, select number of questions, and you're good to go!
useOnboarding.join-quiz-description: Joining a quiz is easy! Enter the quiz code or follow the link to test your knowledge and have fun!
useOnboarding.choose-plan-description: Find the perfect plan for you! Explore our options to select a plan that matches your needs and goals. Upgrade anytime as you grow!
useOnboarding.edit-quiz-description: Need to make changes? Edit your quiz at any time by updating questions, adding new ones, or tweaking the settings.
useOnboarding.share-quiz-description: Sharing is simple! Send your quiz to friends, students, or colleagues with a unique link or via quiz code.
useOnboarding.view-stats-description: Track your progress with detailed stats. View performance trends, accuracy, and areas that need more focus.
useOnboarding.view-summary-description: Check out your quiz summary! See how you performed, review your answers, and identify areas to improve.
useOnboarding.fill-account-description: Let's get started! Fill in your account details to personalize your experience.
